== Notes for [[Item:Q85189|Q85189]] ==

Source 1: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Family_tree_of_Uthman

Source 2: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Uthman_ibn_Affan#Family_of_Uthman

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
671E3145F005C1EFBC189822EF79916C9340
geni:6000000021368355259

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
